titleStmt.title: SII 16.304: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 304. (A.R. No. 322 of 1920.) GOOTY, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar lying in the prākāra of the Rāmasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1515, Vijaya, Jyēshṭha śu. 2 corresponding to 1593 A.D., May 22, (Tuesday).

It records that Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Alluḍu Raghunātharājayyadēva, of Kāśyapagōtra and solar race made an endowment of 24 gadyas per annum at the rate of 2 gadyas per month out of the yīḍiga-gutta of Guttipaṭṇam paid into the hands of Khaṇḍērāya for the daily supply of flower garlands to god Rāmachandra of Jagatāpi-gutti.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyuda
ya śālivahana śakavaruṣaṁbulu
1515 Agunēṭi vijaya saṁvvatsa
ra jēṣṭha śu 2 lū śrīmadrājādhirāja
rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvī
ra veṁkkaṭapatidēvamahārāyalugā
ru ghanagiridurggamaṁdu vajrasiṁhvā
sanārūḍhulai pruthvisāṁbrājyaṁ cē
yucunnuṁḍāgānu dēvadēvōttama
dēvaśikhāmaṇi Akhilāṁḍḍakōṭi bra
ṁhmāṁḍḍanāyakuḍaina jagatāpi
gutti śrīrāmacaṁdradēvuni tō
mālasēvaku samarpiṁci dhārapōsi
yiccina vivaraṁ śrīmaṁnmmahā

maṁḍḍalēśvara kāsyapagōtraṁ sū
ryyavaṁśōdbhavulaina Alluḍu raghu
nātharājayyadēva mahārāju
lugāru Ardhōdaya mahōdaya pu
ṇyakālamaṁdu dhārabōsi samarpi
stimi tōmālasēvaku Ādavāni mādi
nēni basavappa komāruṁḍu khaṁḍḍerā
yaḍu di 1 ki Alaṁkāra tōmāllu jō
ḍu lekhanu dinaṁprati kodavagākuṁḍā
nu di 30 Ayina nela 1 ki gutti paṭṭaṇaṁ yi
ḍigegutta rokhaṁlōnu 8 ga 2 lekhanu
yēḍu 1 ki 8 ga 24 lekhanu kaṭaḍa śēstimi
ganaka Ā rokhaṁ puccukoni kānācigānu
nī putrapautrapāraṁparyaṁgānu Ācaṁdrā
rkasthāyigānu sukhāna svāmiśēva cēsuko
ni vuṁḍumani dhārabōsi yistimi ya

vvaru durgaṁ yēlinānu yā maṇihagāṁ
ḍu Ā yiḍigegutta cēsi naḍacinā Ā maṇiha
gāṁḍu durgādhipatiṁnni naḍapagalavāru
yī dharmānaku yevaru vakraṁkāgānu va
kraṁ Ayinavāṁḍlu tamatallidaṁḍrini
vārāṇāsini vadha sēsina pāpānaku bō
yinavāṁḍlu Ani yicina dharmaśāsanaṁ
svadatāṁparadatāṁ vvā yō harēti vasuṁdha
rā . ṣaṣṭivarurṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhayāṁ
jāyatē krimī .
Digital edition of SII 16.304 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
